query: ho tipo 200 email non lette, fammi un riassunto della inbox e dimmi se c'è qualcosa di urgente da un cliente o dal mio capo marco@acmecorp.it
check my calendar for next week, I need to find a 2-hour slot on tuesday or wednesday afternoon for a meeting with the design team. also check if anyone from the team emailed me about availability
upload the Q1 report I just saved at ~/Documents/q1-report-2026.pdf to the 'Finance Reports' folder in my Google Drive and share it with sarah@company.com as viewer
leggi il foglio Google Sheets con i dati delle vendite (id: 1abc123def) e aggiungici una riga con i numeri di oggi: Prodotto A, 150 unità, €12,500
I need to reply to the email from john about the project deadline — his message ID is 19d1b97e694ce208. tell him we need 2 more weeks and cc my manager at boss@company.com
send an email to the whole team (alice@co.com, bob@co.com, carol@co.com) with the meeting notes I have in /tmp/notes.md — attach the file too. subject should be 'Sprint 12 Retro Notes'
what's on my agenda today? I'm in Rome so use Europe/Rome timezone. also create a reminder event at 5pm called 'Pick up dry cleaning'
cerca nei miei contatti Google il numero di telefono di Alessandro Bianchi, mi serve per chiamarlo
I need to set up a standup routine — every morning I want to see my calendar, unread emails, and open tasks in one view. can you run the standup workflow?
forward the email about the Malta trip (the one from booking.com) to my wife at maria@gmail.com and add a note saying 'here are our hotel details'
write a python script that reads data from a CSV file at ./sales.csv, calculates monthly totals, and generates a matplotlib bar chart saved as chart.png

I want to build a Google Form that automatically sends a personalized email to each respondent when they submit — the form should have 5 questions about customer satisfaction and run on a weekly trigger
set up a webhook endpoint that listens for Stripe payment notifications and logs each payment to a Google Sheet automatically every time someone pays
my react native app crashes on iOS when I try to open the camera — here's the stack trace from Xcode. can you figure out what's wrong?
I need to migrate our Postgres database from Heroku to AWS RDS, can you help me plan the migration steps and write the terraform config?
help me set up a cron job on my mac that runs every Monday at 8am and sends me a Slack message with a summary of my week
create a Next.js API route that authenticates with Google OAuth and fetches the user's calendar events — I want to build a custom dashboard UI
I have a spreadsheet saved locally as an .xlsx file at ~/Downloads/budget.xlsx — can you read it and tell me the total in column D?
configure my Gmail filters so that all emails from newsletters go to a label called 'Newsletters' and skip the inbox — I want this to run automatically going forward
scrape the product prices from https://example-store.com/products and save them to a Google Sheet every day — I need price tracking over time
